channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Warren says Atkins misled Congress on SEC enforcement collapse—now at a 20-year low. Is the agency pulling back, or politics pulling strings? 🧐 https://Blockchain.News/news/warren-accuses-sec-atkins-misleading-congress-enforcement #crypto #SEC #regulation

item.title: Kelp DAO’s rsETH bridge is drained: $293M stolen, cascading DeFi freezes ripple through 9 protocols. ETH rushes into the clampdown as attackers move funds. 🛑 #DeFi #KelpDAO #crypto hacks https://Blockchain.News/news/kelp-dao-exploited-293m-largest-defi-hack-2026

item.title: 🔥 Miners burn money as profits squeeze: Bitcoin mining difficulty dips 1.1% but 32,000 BTC dumped in Q1 2026—more than all of 2025. https://Blockchain.News/news/bitcoin-mining-difficulty-dips-miners-sell-record-btc #Bitcoin #Mining #CryptoNews
item.description: 🔥 Miners burn money as profits squeeze: Bitcoin mining difficulty dips 1.1% but 32,000 BTC dumped in Q1 2026—more than all of 2025. https://Blockchain.News/news/bitcoin-mining-difficulty-dips-miners-sell-record-btc #Bitcoin #Mining #CryptoNews
